title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒②

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Etsuko Otonashi invites Taiki Shuttle
along to watch the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two runners to watch out for—the
previous Umamusume of the Year, Air Groove,
and the current favorite Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Silence Suzuka reigns victorious with a
stunning breakaway, winning over the hearts of
even more fans.
